description: Represents the persistent key-value context storage, recruiter reply memory, and optimization learnings stored by the ecosystem agent.

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique identifier for this AI context record.

columns.name: user_id
columns.constraints: FOREIGN KEY(auth_user.id), UNIQUE, ON DELETE CASCADE
columns.description: Links persistent context directly to the active candidate.

columns.name: context_blob
columns.description: Dynamic key-value context indexing recruiter comments, preferred keywords, and personalized guidance.

columns.name: last_interaction_at
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when the AI nervous system last enriched or processed context.
